apiDocs.description: Explore our complete REST API reference with interactive documentation. Try endpoints directly from your browser.

vanilla.prefix: Use the core generators directly — no framework required. Each variant provides three functions:

functions.generateData: Returns raw generation data for custom rendering
functions.renderSvg: Renders SVG from data with options
functions.generateSvg: Combines generation and rendering in one call
